summary: Completed metalearning brainstorm. Produced: (1) metalearning_brainstorm.md — 10-section deep-dive covering all paradigms (optimization-based, metric-based, model-based, hyperparameter search), neuroscience connections, 5 novel research ideas, theoretical foundations, and a prioritized research agenda. (2) metalearning_sketches.py — Runnable PyTorch implementations of MAML, ProtoNets, Matching Networks, Reptile, External Memory (NTM-style), L2O (LSTM optimizer), Fast Weights, and an in-context learning demo. (3) metalearning_concept_map.py/txt — ASCII taxonomy + design tradeoffs map. Key insight highlighted: Transformers performing in-context learning ARE metalearners by construction. Top open problems: OOD task generalization, continual metalearning without forgetting, compositional task representations.
